name: Weather Tool
description: Handles: weather, rain, umbrella, temperature, hot conditions, tomorrow forecasts, weekend forecasts, and city forecasts. Not for: flight, train, hotel, ticket, arithmetic, stock price, bitcoin price, alarm, schedule, meeting, appointment, summarize, rewrite, extract.

name: Travel Tool
description: Handles: flight, train, hotel, ticket, trip booking, destination stay, and book travel plans. Not for: weather, rain, umbrella, arithmetic, stock price, bitcoin price, alarm, schedule, meeting, appointment, summarize, rewrite, extract.

name: Calculation Tool
description: Handles: arithmetic, times, add, convert, percent, tip, totals, and numeric calculations. Not for: flight, train, hotel, weather, stock price, bitcoin price, alarm, schedule, meeting, appointment, summarize, rewrite, extract.

name: Document Tool
description: Handles: summarize, rewrite, extract, bullet points, action items, notes, emails, and paragraph editing. Not for: weather, rain, umbrella, flight, train, hotel, arithmetic, stock price, bitcoin price, alarm, schedule, meeting, appointment.

name: Finance Tool
description: Handles: stock price, bitcoin price, crypto price, closing price, and market performance. Not for: weather, travel, flight, hotel, arithmetic, alarm, schedule, meeting, appointment, summarize, rewrite, extract.

name: Calendar Tool
description: Handles: alarm, schedule, meeting, appointment, move, reschedule, and event setup. Not for: weather, rain, flight, hotel, arithmetic, stock price, bitcoin price, summarize, rewrite, extract.
